clauses.statement: A Run Context Capsule contains the typed Story, Run, HEAD, objective, invariants, bottleneck, evidence, decision, budget, and last-progress fields required to resume a guarded Run.

test_refs.case: RCC-S-1 RCC-S-2 RCC-S-3 capsule is typed, bounded, and accounts for every reduced section

clauses.statement: The serialized UTF-8 capsule is at most 32768 bytes and records every deterministically reduced optional section in truncated_sections while retaining source references.

test_refs.case: RCC-S-1 RCC-S-2 RCC-S-3 capsule is typed, bounded, and accounts for every reduced section

clauses.statement: Capsules persist allowlisted summaries, relative source references, and SHA-256 fingerprints but never persist tool output, full source JSON, diffs, test logs, provider transcripts, prompts, or hidden reasoning.

test_refs.case: RCC-S-1 RCC-S-2 RCC-S-3 capsule is typed, bounded, and accounts for every reduced section

clauses.statement: Capsule projection runs only after authoritative Run, verification, review, or decision persistence; exact authoritative bytes define event identity, so an unchanged source set stays byte-stable and any source-byte or source-set change regenerates the capsule.

test_refs.case: RCC-S-4 refresh is byte-stable until a meaningful source changes
RCC-S-4 guarded Run persistence emits capsule refresh events after authority commit
DRES-SCENARIO-005 recording a decision refreshes the single active Run Context Capsule

clauses.statement: A capsule whose Story id, Run id, persisted HEAD, current authoritative Git HEAD, source existence, exact source fingerprint, or complete currently available source set does not match fails closed with a typed non-mutating error and may only be rebuilt from authoritative sources.

test_refs.case: RCC-S-5 stale HEAD and missing sources fail closed without rewriting the capsule
RCC-S-5 a newly available optional source stales the old capsule and explicit rebuild recovers it
RCC-S-5 malformed capsule and malformed optional JSON fail closed without projection mutation
RCC-S-5 mismatched Story frontmatter fails closed before capsule creation

clauses.statement: After a process restart or managed-worktree handoff, a fresh process reconstructs the current blocker, open decisions, evidence references, budget, and progress from persisted files without transcript input.

test_refs.case: RCC-S-6 RCC-S-7 fresh-process recovery reconstructs the blocker and decision context without transcript input
RCC-S-4 RCC-S-6 managed refresh mirrors exact bytes and a new process recovers decisions

clauses.statement: Contract tests cover size and truncation bookkeeping, forbidden raw bodies, stale HEAD, missing and newly available sources, malformed JSON, atomic and mirror failures, decision refresh, ambiguous active Runs, managed mirroring, and fresh-process recovery.

test_refs.case: RCC-S-1 RCC-S-2 RCC-S-3 capsule is typed, bounded, and accounts for every reduced section
RCC-S-5 stale HEAD and missing sources fail closed without rewriting the capsule
RCC-S-5 atomic authority failure preserves the previous capsule bytes
RCC-S-5 mirror failure is typed after the authority commits
RCC-S-5 multiple active runs produce an explicit ambiguous result
RCC-S-4 RCC-S-6 managed refresh mirrors exact bytes and a new process recovers decisions

diagrams.rationale: Shows the authority-first event projection and validated restart path required by RCC-S-4 through RCC-S-6.
diagrams.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  Event["Run, verification, review, or decision event"] --> Authority["persist authoritative artifact"]
  Authority --> Project["derive bounded capsule"]
  Project --> Canonical["write authority capsule"]
  Canonical --> Mirror["copy exact bytes to managed mirror"]
  Canonical --> Validate["validate Story, Run, HEAD, sources"]
  Validate --> Recover["restart or handoff decision view"]

diagrams.rationale: Captures missing, fresh, unchanged, stale, and rebuilt states in the fail-closed freshness lifecycle.
diagrams.mermaid:
stateDiagram-v2
  [*] --> missing
  missing --> fresh: meaningful event or explicit rebuild
  fresh --> unchanged: identical event fingerprint
  fresh --> stale: HEAD, source bytes, or source set changes
  stale --> rebuilt: explicit rebuild from authorities
  rebuilt --> fresh
  unchanged --> fresh: meaningful source change

diagrams.rationale: Documents the data-minimization boundary that prevents transcript and raw evidence duplication.
diagrams.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  Sources["authoritative Story, Run, Gate, evidence, decisions"] --> Allowlist["allowlisted scalar extraction"]
  Allowlist --> Capsule["context capsule <= 32 KiB"]
  Raw["logs, diffs, full JSON, transcripts, prompts"] -.->|"never embedded"| Capsule
  Capsule --> Reader["binding and fingerprint validator"]
  Reader --> Decision["bounded recovery view"]
